prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(initiate_campaign_entity upstream_line_1)
(initiate_campaign_entity downstream_line_1)
(initiate_campaign_entity manufacturing_order_mo1)
(initiate_campaign_entity manufacturing_order_mo2)
(reserve_equipment_for_campaign upstream_line_1 equipment_reactor_1)
(reserve_equipment_for_campaign downstream_line_1 equipment_filler_1)
(reserve_equipment_for_campaign manufacturing_order_mo1 equipment_packer_1)
(assign_operator_to_campaign upstream_line_1 operator_1)
(confirm_operator_handover upstream_line_1 operator_1)
(mark_upstream_stage_ready upstream_line_1 stage_fermentation operator_1)
(assign_support_team_to_campaign upstream_line_1 support_team_alpha)
(complete_upstream_setup_with_support upstream_line_1 stage_fermentation support_team_alpha)
(release_operator_from_campaign upstream_line_1 operator_1)
(assign_operator_to_campaign downstream_line_1 operator_1)
(confirm_operator_handover downstream_line_1 operator_1)
(mark_downstream_stage_ready downstream_line_1 stage_purification operator_1)
(release_support_team_from_campaign upstream_line_1 support_team_alpha)
(assign_support_team_to_campaign downstream_line_1 support_team_alpha)
(complete_downstream_setup_with_support downstream_line_1 stage_purification support_team_alpha)
(assemble_batch_record_document upstream_line_1 downstream_line_1 stage_fermentation stage_purification batch_record_br001)
(release_operator_from_campaign downstream_line_1 operator_1)
(assign_operator_to_campaign upstream_line_1 operator_1)
(activate_batch_record_document_for_qc batch_record_br001 upstream_line_1 operator_1)
(release_support_team_from_campaign downstream_line_1 support_team_alpha)
(release_operator_from_campaign upstream_line_1 operator_1)
(assign_operator_to_campaign manufacturing_order_mo1 operator_1)
(confirm_operator_handover manufacturing_order_mo1 operator_1)
(issue_qc_sample_for_order manufacturing_order_mo1 qc_sample_1 batch_record_br001)
(start_qc_test_sequence manufacturing_order_mo1 qc_sample_1 batch_record_br001 operator_1)
(attach_component_kit_to_order manufacturing_order_mo1 component_kit_1)
(assign_support_team_to_campaign manufacturing_order_mo1 support_team_alpha)
(execute_inspection_sequence_phase1 manufacturing_order_mo1 component_kit_1 support_team_alpha qc_sample_1 batch_record_br001)
(attach_certificate_to_order manufacturing_order_mo1 certificate_1)
(initiate_final_inspection_phase manufacturing_order_mo1 certificate_1 qc_sample_1 batch_record_br001)
(finalize_order_release manufacturing_order_mo1)
(bind_release_document_by_operator manufacturing_order_mo1 release_doc_1 operator_1)
(release_order_and_return_equipment manufacturing_order_mo1 equipment_packer_1 release_doc_1)
(detach_component_kit_from_order manufacturing_order_mo1 component_kit_1)
(detach_certificate_from_order manufacturing_order_mo1 certificate_1)
(release_operator_from_campaign manufacturing_order_mo1 operator_1)
(release_support_team_from_campaign manufacturing_order_mo1 support_team_alpha)
(reserve_equipment_for_campaign manufacturing_order_mo2 equipment_packer_1)
(assign_operator_to_campaign manufacturing_order_mo2 operator_1)
(confirm_operator_handover manufacturing_order_mo2 operator_1)
(issue_qc_sample_for_order manufacturing_order_mo2 qc_sample_2 batch_record_br001)
(start_qc_test_sequence manufacturing_order_mo2 qc_sample_2 batch_record_br001 operator_1)
(attach_component_kit_to_order manufacturing_order_mo2 component_kit_1)
(assign_support_team_to_campaign manufacturing_order_mo2 support_team_alpha)
(execute_inspection_sequence_phase1 manufacturing_order_mo2 component_kit_1 support_team_alpha qc_sample_2 batch_record_br001)
(attach_certificate_to_order manufacturing_order_mo2 certificate_1)
(initiate_final_inspection_phase manufacturing_order_mo2 certificate_1 qc_sample_2 batch_record_br001)
(finalize_order_release manufacturing_order_mo2)
(bind_release_document_by_operator manufacturing_order_mo2 release_doc_1 operator_1)
(release_order_and_return_equipment manufacturing_order_mo2 equipment_packer_1 release_doc_1)
(release_upstream_line upstream_line_1 batch_record_br001)
(release_downstream_line downstream_line_1 batch_record_br001)
(release_operator_from_campaign manufacturing_order_mo2 operator_1)
(assign_operator_to_campaign upstream_line_1 operator_1)
(bind_release_document_by_operator upstream_line_1 release_doc_1 operator_1)
(release_upstream_line_and_return_equipment upstream_line_1 equipment_reactor_1 release_doc_1)
(release_operator_from_campaign upstream_line_1 operator_1)
(assign_operator_to_campaign downstream_line_1 operator_1)
(bind_release_document_by_operator downstream_line_1 release_doc_1 operator_1)
(release_downstream_line_and_return_equipment downstream_line_1 equipment_filler_1 release_doc_1)
message.reasoning:
The problem involves a manufacturing campaign with upstream_line_1, downstream_line_1, and two manufacturing orders: mo1 and mo2. Both orders are assigned to both lines, and linked to the same batch_record_br001 and their respective qc_samples.


## Examining manufacturing setup  
- The problem centers on a manufacturing campaign involving upstream_line_1 and downstream_line_1.  
- Two manufacturing orders, mo1 and mo2, are assigned to both lines and linked to batch_record_br001.  
- Each order is associated with its respective qc_samples for quality control purposes.

## Examining manufacturing setup  
- The goal is to release all four entities: upstream_line_1, downstream_line_1, mo1, and mo2.  
- All campaign entities need initiation before proceeding, as none are initialized yet.  
- Initiation includes upstream_line_1, downstream_line_1, and both manufacturing orders (mo1, mo2).  

## Planning equipment assignment  
- Equipment available includes reactor_1, filler_1, and packer_1; needs assignment to specific entities.  
- Assigned reactor_1 to upstream_line_1 and filler_1 to downstream_line_1; packer_1 planned for one order, but unclear for the second order.  

## Addressing equipment constraints  
- Only three equipment units for four entities; same equipment can't be assigned to multiple entities simultaneously.  
- Orders likely require equipment, but with limited packers, one order may face assignment issues.  

## Checking inspection kit availability  
- Inspection kit_1 is available, linked to manufacturing_order_mo1; kit_2 is linked to mo2 but not available.  
- This may limit release options, as inspection kit availability affects order release.

## Exploring process sequence  
- Orders share a batch record, suggesting processing lines first, then activating QC and issuing samples for both orders.  
- Different paths exist for order release, including QC sequences or regulatory inspections, depending on inspection kit availability.  

## Planning campaign steps  
- Start by initiating all four entities: upstream_line_1, downstream_line_1, mo1, and mo2.  
- Assign equipment sequentially: reactor_1 to upstream_line_1, filler_1 to downstream_line_1, and packer_1 to mo1, planning to reuse packer for mo2 later.  

## Managing line preparation  
- Assign an operator to upstream_line_1 and confirm handover to prepare for the upstream stage.  
- Mark the upstream fermentation stage ready, setting the stage for further line readiness and segment completion.

## Continuing line preparation  
- Issued qc_sample_1 for manufacturing_order_mo1, linked to batch_record_br001, starting the quality control process.  
- Started qc_test_sequence for mo1 with operator_1, as standard assemble didn't require upstream approval, setting order_qc_sequence_started.  

## Evaluating inspection steps  
- Execute_inspection_sequence_phase1 for mo1 requires a linked component_kit, which isn't assigned yet; component_kit_1 is available for attachment.  
- Need to assign support to mo1 for inspection, but support is currently tied to downstream_line_1, requiring release first.

## Evaluating inspection readiness  
- Upstream and downstream stages aren't approved yet, affecting inspection readiness for mo1.  
- Initiating final inspection phase requires linking certificate_1 to mo1, which is currently not linked.  

## Managing certificate attachment  
- Attached certificate_1 to mo1, meeting prerequisites for initiating final inspection phase.  
- Final inspection phase for mo1 set order_inspection_ready, but didn't mark it as approved.  

## Reviewing release processes  
- Finalize_order_release sets order_released and campaign_entity_ready_for_release, but not campaign_entity_released.  
- To fully release, need to attach a release document and use release_order_and_return_equipment, ensuring equipment and documents are available.

## Reviewing release processes  
- Binding release_doc_1 to manufacturing_order_mo1 by operator_1 sets it attached and linked to the campaign, freeing the document for use.  
- Releasing manufacturing_order_mo1 with equipment_packer_1 and release_doc_1 marks the campaign as released, making the equipment and document available again.  

## Managing equipment and operator transitions  
- After releasing manufacturing_order_mo1, equipment_packer_1 becomes available and is reserved for manufacturing_order_mo2.  
- Operator_1 and support_team_alpha are released from manufacturing_order_mo1, then reassigned to manufacturing_order_mo2 for further processing.  

## Addressing component kit limitations  
- Component_kit_1, linked to manufacturing_order_mo1, is required for inspection phases but only one kit is available, posing a challenge for manufacturing_order_mo2.  
- Detaching the component kit from manufacturing_order_mo1 after release could free it for use with manufacturing_order_mo2, aligning with inspection needs.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
